jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Saksoft
jsonLd.description:
Join the Saksoft family as a Frontend Developer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Saksoft:
Saksoft is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft!
